title: Yield-first input claim under review
summary: A high-input yield claim is flagged for missing biodiversity and water externality context.
claim_text: Synthetic-input intensification is framed as the only scalable food-security pathway, without disclosing soil, water, biodiversity, and animal-welfare tradeoffs.

title: Soil health and carbon cluster strengthened
summary: A new evidence cluster supports improved aggregation, infiltration, and microbial activity under diversified regenerative management.
claim_text: Diversified rotations, living roots, composted biomass, and reduced soil disturbance can strengthen soil structure when measured with context-specific indicators.
